select_when: A team is converging on a favored answer before the evidence has been fully tested.
Disconfirming evidence keeps getting reframed, minimized, or pushed to the edge of the discussion.
The decision is emotionally, politically, or reputationally charged enough that people are likely to defend a conclusion instead of testing it.
A recommendation packet is built around visible wins while failed cases, churn, or rejected signals were not counted with equal weight.
avoid_when: The review is already structured around explicit falsification, equal treatment of confirming and disconfirming evidence, and adversarial challenge.
The model is being used only to accuse other people of bias without tightening the team's own evidence standards, incentives, or sacred assumptions.

curation_notes.summary: Kept the activation surface focused on evidence filtering and premature conclusion defense rather than donor scenario lists.
donor_drops: Dropped donor scenario examples that restated the same confirmation structure in case-specific language.
Dropped donor higher-order relation fields and runtime-shaped overlays because batch 2 keeps the frozen first-order contract only.
open_questions: The input and output type labels are reviewed operational normalization rather than explicit raw-source fields.

select_when.note: Raw activation lines and packet-shaped examples supplied the core structure; donor cases helped confirm recurring use, but the final triggers were rewritten into structural evidence-review conditions.

avoid_when.note: The raw file has dangers and anti-patterns rather than a clean anti-activation list, so these conditions are reviewed normalizations grounded in those weaknesses.

input_type.note: The source clearly frames a judgment under evidence review, but the compact type label is an operational normalization.

output_type.note: The raw model acts as a warning and pressure mechanism for disconfirming evidence; the output label compresses that role into a reviewed operational form.

reasoning_types.note: The model is clearly diagnostic and metacognitive in use, but the taxonomy labels remain reviewed normalization.
